prompt:
Ultra-realistic smartphone mirror selfie of a beautiful young East Asian woman sitting on a simple wooden chair in a cozy bedroom at night. She has long silky jet-black hair with soft straight bangs, fair porcelain skin, large almond-shaped brown eyes, natural Korean makeup, and a calm, gentle expression while looking at her phone screen. She wears a white short-sleeve blouse layered with a fitted white camisole, a large gray ribbon bow at the collar, a gray-blue plaid pleated skirt with delicate white lace trim, white ankle socks with tiny ribbon details, and no shoes. One arm rests naturally across her lap while holding a light-colored iPhone with the camera flash turned on, creating a bright mirror reflection and realistic lens flare. The room features a neatly made bed, soft pastel decorations, cute wall art, warm ambient lighting, and a full-length mirror with small decorative stickers on the frame. Authentic handheld mobile photo, casual indoor snapshot, natural imperfections on the mirror, slight noise, realistic skin texture, soft shadows, cozy Korean bedroom aesthetic, vertical 3:4 composition, iPhone camera quality, candid lifestyle photography, ultra-realistic, 4K.
